description: Examples-as-context for spec-debug trigger and boundary coverage. They are not a deterministic router.

cases.input: npx jest tests/unit/example.test.js fails with TypeError: cannot read property 'id' of undefined.
cases.expected_outcome: Reproduce or record why reproduction is not possible, trace the causal chain, fix one scoped cause, and rerun the feedback loop.

cases.input: I already tried two fixes and the same test still fails; debug why.
cases.expected_outcome: Invalidate contradicted evidence, form a new hypothesis, and prove root cause before another fix.

cases.input: Design a new retry feature and plan how to implement it.
cases.expected_outcome: Route feature planning to spec-plan or spec-work depending on plan readiness.
cases.boundary_note: Spec-debug is for broken behavior and root-cause work, not new feature design.

cases.input: Review this completed diff for bugs before PR.
cases.boundary_note: Reviewing a completed diff is not root-cause debugging unless a concrete failure is present.

cases.input: A production-only bug happened once, but no logs, steps, or environment are available.
cases.expected_outcome: Record the missing reproduction condition and avoid claiming confirmed root cause.
cases.boundary_note: Unreproducible bugs need honest degraded evidence, not fabricated causality.
